goal: Build a small automatic plant watering device from cheap or salvaged parts. It should read soil moisture and run a mini pump briefly when the plant is dry.
evidence_notes: board: board_id=main_ctrl path=../main_ctrl_esp32_servo.net kind=netlist
measure: controller_case inner width value_mm=95 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/calipers
measure: pump_mount width value_mm=55 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/calipers
measure: tube strain relief value_mm=8 status=verified artifact=evidence://plant/calipers
clearance: controller_case cable routing clearance_mm=1.2 status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/calipers
simulation: controller_case enclosure clearance status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/fit-load-simulation
simulation: pump_mount retained load status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/fit-load-simulation
simulation: watering_module tube routing status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/fit-load-simulation
mechanical_bench: pump_mount printed fit status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/mechanical-bench
load_test: pump retained under tubing pull status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/mechanical-bench
mechanical_motion: tube routing during pump vibration status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/mechanical-bench
robotics_bench: pump first run status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/robotics-bench
robotics_current: pump startup current current_a=0.82 status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/robotics-bench
cycle_test: five short watering cycles status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/robotics-bench
integrated_electrical: logic rail remains stable during pump run status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/integrated-bench
integrated_motion: soil dry command triggers timed pump run status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/integrated-bench
integrated_packaging: wet path separated from controller_case status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/integrated-bench
integrated_thermal: MOSFET module remains touch-safe after five cycles status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/integrated-bench
mission: desk plant dry-soil watering mission status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/field-run
field: supervised desk plant run with manual stop available status=pass artifact=evidence://plant/field-run

release: scope="Release limited to supervised low-voltage desk plant watering prototype with current limit, timeout, dry-run limit, leak check, and no unattended operation claim." accepted=true artifact=evidence://plant/release-review
